text.title: Release Planning Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Release Planning.

example.scenario: Release v1.4 'cut signup friction'. Scope: 4 tickets (form, OAuth, copy, instrumentation). Readiness: tests green, support FAQ updated, error budget reset. Comms: in-app banner + changelog post. Rollback: feature-flag toggle (tested in staging). Ship Tuesday 10:00; 14d retro: signup conversion +6pp; closed.
